CStrings:
+ "  Feature ID %3zu: 0x%02X\n"
+ " Parity Sectors: %5d  "
+ " [%d%%]  "
+ "%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x"
+ "%@.done"
+ "%@: manually increment timestamp %u at entry %d"
+ "%@: power = %@, energy = %u, timestamp = %u"
+ "%@: reached the end of buffer at entry %d due to timestamp jump %u"
+ "%s, Error:%{public}@"
+ "%s: Called without info"
+ "%s: Error: %{public}@"
+ "%s: Fired intelligentConnectivityChanged with featureEnabled: %d, userEnabled: %d"
+ "%s: Got quickSwitchState: %ld"
+ "%{public}s: Controller found: %s"
+ "%{public}s: Find service for class %s"
+ "%{public}s: NANDExporter object locked"
+ "%{public}s: NANDExporter object unlocked"
+ "%{public}s: pthread_mutex_trylock() (%d) failed"
+ "%{public}s: serializeAccess already locked. waiting for lock"
+ "----------------------------------------\n"
+ "-[PLBBAgent intelligentConnectivityChanged:]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logIntelligentConnectivity:]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logIntelligentConnectivity:]_block_invoke"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logIntelligentConnectivityAtInit]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logQuickSwitchAtInit]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logQuickSwitchAtInit]_block_invoke"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logQuickSwitchState:]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent logQuickSwitchState:]_block_invoke"
+ "-[PLBBAgent quickSwitchStateDidChange:]"
+ "-[PLBBAgent quickSwitchStateDidChange:]_block_invoke"
+ "AOD state %d for display %@ (primary: %d)"
+ "APSD_PushTopicLimit_1_2"
+ "ASP feature list written to %s done"
+ "ASP get feature list data done."
+ "AWDL inactivity - duration: %ds, display: %@, clients: %@"
+ "AWDL timeout - matched advertising service '%@' to process '%@'"
+ "AWDL timeout - matched browsing service '%@' to process '%@'"
+ "AWDL timeout - no process match, using service name: %@"
+ "AWDL timeout - parsed %lu registered client mappings"
+ "AWDL timeout - responsible process: %@"
+ "ActiveProcesses"
+ "AppleANS2DARTNVMeController"
+ "BEAM_RECOVERY_FAILURE"
+ "BatteryPackCount"
+ "BatterySerial2"
+ "CLI: Set exceedance count for LimitID %@ to %d"
+ "CPU_Energy"
+ "Can't allocate buffer for reading Serial Number!\n"
+ "Config Type: Large config\n"
+ "Config Type: Small config (Support BPB)\n"

+ "DRAM_VDDQL"
